underconstrained.trigger: insufficient constraints to produce unique allocation
underconstrained.notes: Apply max/min bounds and drop strategies that fail minimum data quality.

contradictory.trigger: constraints conflict (e.g., min weight sum > 1, turnover + exposure impossible)
contradictory.notes: Return explicit conflict fields and require operator adjustment.

objective_unsolved.trigger: optimizer does not converge within deterministic iteration budget
objective_unsolved.notes: Use sorted Sharpe/risk heuristic capped by max weight and turnover limit.
